assertions: Admin-enabled runtime OpenAPI declares AdminApiKeyHeader as an apiKey header security scheme.
Admin-enabled runtime OpenAPI declares AdminBearer as an HTTP bearer security scheme.
Protected generated REST operations include AdminApiKeyHeader or AdminBearer security requirements.
Public OAuth/OIDC discovery routes are not marked as admin-gated.
AdminGate continues to defer live OpenAPI and OpenRPC payload generation to the upstream Tigrbl app.
AdminGate OpenAPI metadata uses upstream Tigrbl APIKey and HTTPBearer security abstractions.
